content:
First rule of hiring: don't hire.

 

The first line on the first page of the first chapter.
You probably don't need to read any further :)

 

Mark Horstman loving your books!

images.alt: Black cover with grey dot grid, orange sphere, blue spheres; Mark Horstman, The Effective Hiring Manager, Wiley.

headline: First rule of hiring: don't hire.
description: A tongue-in-cheek take that the first rule of hiring is to avoid hiring unless truly needed.
